---
title: "Caption Contest ‚Äî Data Cleaning & Codebook"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(psych)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

# 1. Codebook

## 1.1 Overview

This document cleans raw data from the Caption Contest study (studies: `prolific3`, `connect1`). The final dataset has **one row per participant** with the submission, all survey phases, and derived variables merged together.

**Source collections** (MongoDB `cartoons` database):

- `submissions` ‚Äî one row per caption submission
- `surveys` ‚Äî one row per survey phase per participant (up to 3 phases)
- `votes` ‚Äî pairwise comparisons used for Elo ratings (pre-computed; not merged here)

**Raw data files** (created by `download_raw_data.R`):

- `raw_submissions.rds` (N = 182)
- `raw_surveys.rds` (N = 460 rows; 154 unique participants)
- `raw_votes.rds` (N = 14,382)

## 1.2 Variable Definitions

```{r codebook-table}
codebook <- tribble(
  ~variable,              ~type,      ~values,                         ~description,
  # ‚îÄ‚îÄ Identifiers ‚îÄ‚îÄ
  "submission_id",        "character", "MongoDB ObjectId string",      "Unique submission identifier (primary key)",
  "prolific_pid",         "character", "Prolific participant ID",      "Participant identifier from Prolific",
  "study",                "factor",    "prolific3, connect1",          "Study wave / recruitment platform",
  "condition",            "factor",    "solo, ai",                     "Experimental condition: solo (no AI) vs. ai (AI available, originally 'many-noprompt')",

  # ‚îÄ‚îÄ Task behavior ‚îÄ‚îÄ
  "caption",              "character", "Free text",                    "Participant's submitted caption",
  "n_keystrokes",         "integer",   "0‚Äì642",                        "Total keystrokes recorded during caption writing",
  "n_ai_uses",            "integer",   "0‚Äì20 (0 for solo)",            "Number of times participant requested AI assistance",
  "ai_used",              "logical",   "TRUE/FALSE",                   "Whether participant used AI at least once (always FALSE for solo)",
  "n_tab_leaves",         "integer",   "0+",                           "Number of times participant left the browser tab",
  "task_duration_s",      "numeric",   "13‚Äì968",                       "Total time on task in seconds (from botTimingMs / 1000)",

  # ‚îÄ‚îÄ Caption quality ‚îÄ‚îÄ
  "elo",                  "numeric",   "1268‚Äì1747",                    "Elo rating from pairwise voting (higher = funnier)",
  "vote_count",           "integer",   "0‚Äì58",                         "Number of pairwise votes this caption received",
  "pretrained_score",     "integer",   "7‚Äì99",                         "Score from pretrained humor model (0‚Äì100 scale)",
  "llm_humor",            "integer",   "1‚Äì10",                         "LLM judge: humor rating",
  "llm_cleverness",       "integer",   "1‚Äì10",                         "LLM judge: cleverness rating",
  "llm_fit",              "integer",   "1‚Äì10",                         "LLM judge: fit-to-cartoon rating",
  "llm_overall",          "integer",   "1‚Äì10",                         "LLM judge: overall quality rating",
  "llm_comment",          "character", "Free text",                    "LLM judge: qualitative comment",

  # ‚îÄ‚îÄ Feedback condition ‚îÄ‚îÄ
  "feedback_type",        "factor",    "honest_coarsened, none",       "Whether participant received feedback (honest_coarsened) or not (none)",
  "top_half",             "logical",   "TRUE/FALSE/NA",                "Whether caption was in top half (feedback conditions only; NA if no feedback)",
  "real_percentile",      "integer",   "1‚Äì72",                         "Actual percentile rank of the caption",

  # ‚îÄ‚îÄ Data quality ‚îÄ‚îÄ
  "honeypot_clean",       "logical",   "TRUE/FALSE",                   "Honeypot field was empty (TRUE = passed bot check)",
  "moderation_flagged",   "logical",   "TRUE/FALSE",                   "Whether caption was flagged by moderation",

  # ‚îÄ‚îÄ Survey: Process Agency (identity_process phase) ‚îÄ‚îÄ
  "process_producing",    "integer",   "0‚Äì10",                         "'I felt like I was producing the work'",
  "process_responsible",  "integer",   "0‚Äì10",                         "'I felt responsible for the output'",
  "process_involved",     "integer",   "0‚Äì10",                         "'I felt involved in the process'",
  "process_satisfaction", "integer",   "0‚Äì10",                         "'I felt satisfied with the process'",

  # ‚îÄ‚îÄ Survey: Identity (identity_process phase) ‚îÄ‚îÄ
  "identity_funny",       "integer",   "0‚Äì10",                         "'I see myself as a funny person'",
  "identity_importance",  "integer",   "0‚Äì10",                         "'Being funny is important to me'",
  "identity_reflects",    "integer",   "0‚Äì10",                         "'This caption reflects who I am'",
  "attention_check",      "integer",   "0‚Äì10",                         "Attention check item",

  # ‚îÄ‚îÄ Survey: Outcome Agency (outcome_meaning phase) ‚îÄ‚îÄ
  "outcome_capable",      "integer",   "0‚Äì10",                         "'How capably did you produce a funny caption?'",
  "outcome_effective",    "integer",   "0‚Äì10",                         "'How effectively did you produce a funny caption?'",
  "outcome_power",        "integer",   "0‚Äì10",                         "'How powerfully did you produce a funny caption?'",

  # ‚îÄ‚îÄ Survey: Meaning (outcome_meaning phase) ‚îÄ‚îÄ
  "meaning_fulfilling",   "integer",   "0‚Äì10",                         "'The experience was fulfilling'",
  "meaning_meaningful",   "integer",   "0‚Äì10",                         "'The experience was meaningful'",
  "meaning_mattered",     "integer",   "0‚Äì10",                         "'The experience mattered'",

  # ‚îÄ‚îÄ Survey: Open-ended (open_ended phase) ‚îÄ‚îÄ
  "experience",           "character", "Free text",                    "Open-ended: describe your experience",
  "feedback_text",        "character", "Free text",                    "Open-ended: any feedback on the study",

  # ‚îÄ‚îÄ Composites ‚îÄ‚îÄ
  "process_agency",       "numeric",   "0‚Äì10 (mean)",                  "Mean of process_producing, process_responsible, process_involved",
  "outcome_agency",       "numeric",   "0‚Äì10 (mean)",                  "Mean of outcome_capable, outcome_effective, outcome_power",
  "meaning",              "numeric",   "0‚Äì10 (mean)",                  "Mean of meaning_fulfilling, meaning_meaningful, meaning_mattered",
  "identity",             "numeric",   "0‚Äì10 (mean)",                  "Mean of identity_funny, identity_importance, identity_reflects"
)

codebook |>
  kable(col.names = c("Variable", "Type", "Values", "Description")) |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE, font_size = 12) |>
  pack_rows("Identifiers", 1, 4) |>
  pack_rows("Task Behavior", 5, 10) |>
  pack_rows("Caption Quality", 11, 17) |>
  pack_rows("Feedback Condition", 18, 20) |>
  pack_rows("Data Quality", 21, 22) |>
  pack_rows("Survey: Process Agency", 23, 26) |>
  pack_rows("Survey: Identity", 27, 30) |>
  pack_rows("Survey: Outcome Agency", 31, 33) |>
  pack_rows("Survey: Meaning", 34, 36) |>
  pack_rows("Survey: Open-Ended", 37, 38) |>
  pack_rows("Composites", 39, 42)
```

# 2. Load Raw Data

```{r load-raw}
sub_raw <- readRDS("raw_submissions.rds")
sur_raw <- readRDS("raw_surveys.rds")
```

**Raw counts:** `r nrow(sub_raw)` submissions, `r nrow(sur_raw)` survey rows (`r length(unique(sur_raw$submission_id_str))` unique participants).

# 3. Clean Submissions

```{r clean-submissions}
sub <- sub_raw |>
  transmute(
    submission_id     = submission_id,
    prolific_pid      = prolificPid,
    study             = factor(study, levels = c("prolific3", "connect1")),
    condition         = factor(
      if_else(condition == "many-noprompt", "ai", condition),
      levels = c("solo", "ai")
    ),
    caption           = caption,
    n_keystrokes      = as.integer(n_keystrokes),
    n_ai_uses         = as.integer(n_ai_interactions),
    ai_used           = n_ai_interactions > 0,
    n_tab_leaves      = as.integer(n_tab_leaves),
    task_duration_s   = botTimingMs / 1000,
    elo               = elo,
    vote_count        = as.integer(voteCount),
    pretrained_score  = as.integer(pretrainedScore),
    llm_humor         = llmScores$humor,
    llm_cleverness    = llmScores$cleverness,
    llm_fit           = llmScores$fit,
    llm_overall       = llmScores$overall,
    llm_comment       = llmScores$comment,
    feedback_type     = factor(
      if_else(is.na(feedbackType), "none", feedbackType),
      levels = c("none", "honest_coarsened")
    ),
    top_half          = topHalf,
    real_percentile   = as.integer(realPercentile),
    honeypot_clean    = (honeypotValue == ""),
    moderation_flagged = moderation$flagged
  )

cat(sprintf("Submissions cleaned: %d rows, %d columns\n", nrow(sub), ncol(sub)))
```

# 4. Clean & Pivot Surveys

Each participant has up to 3 survey phases. We pivot the ratings from each phase into a single wide row per participant.

```{r clean-surveys}
# ‚îÄ‚îÄ identity_process phase ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
sur_identity <- sur_raw |>
  filter(phase == "identity_process") |>
  transmute(
    submission_id      = submission_id_str,
    process_producing  = ratings$process_producing,
    process_responsible = ratings$process_responsible,
    process_involved   = ratings$process_involved,
    process_satisfaction = ratings$process_satisfaction,
    identity_funny     = ratings$identity_funny,
    identity_importance = ratings$identity_importance,
    identity_reflects  = ratings$identity_reflects,
    attention_check    = ratings$attention_check
  )

# ‚îÄ‚îÄ outcome_meaning phase ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
sur_outcome <- sur_raw |>
  filter(phase == "outcome_meaning") |>
  transmute(
    submission_id      = submission_id_str,
    outcome_capable    = ratings$outcome_capable_v2,
    outcome_effective  = ratings$outcome_effective_v2,
    outcome_power      = ratings$outcome_power_v2,
    meaning_fulfilling = ratings$meaning_fulfilling,
    meaning_meaningful = ratings$meaning_meaningful,
    meaning_mattered   = ratings$meaning_mattered
  )

# ‚îÄ‚îÄ open_ended phase ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
sur_open <- sur_raw |>
  filter(phase == "open_ended") |>
  transmute(
    submission_id = submission_id_str,
    experience    = ratings$experience,
    feedback_text = ratings$feedback
  )

# Handle duplicates (2 people have duplicate open_ended phases) ‚Äî keep first
sur_open <- sur_open |> distinct(submission_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

cat(sprintf("Survey phases: identity_process=%d, outcome_meaning=%d, open_ended=%d\n",
            nrow(sur_identity), nrow(sur_outcome), nrow(sur_open)))
```

# 5. Merge to One Row per Person

```{r merge}
df <- sub |>
  left_join(sur_identity, by = "submission_id") |>
  left_join(sur_outcome,  by = "submission_id") |>
  left_join(sur_open,     by = "submission_id")

cat(sprintf("Merged dataset: %d rows √ó %d columns\n", nrow(df), ncol(df)))
cat(sprintf("Participants with survey data: %d / %d (%.0f%%)\n",
            sum(!is.na(df$process_producing)), nrow(df),
            100 * mean(!is.na(df$process_producing))))
```

# 6. Composites & Reliability

## 6.1 Process Agency

Items: `process_producing`, `process_responsible`, `process_involved`

```{r alpha-process}
process_items <- df |> select(process_producing, process_responsible, process_involved) |> drop_na()
alpha_process <- psych::alpha(process_items, check.keys = FALSE)
cat(sprintf("Cronbach's Œ± = %.2f (N = %d)\n", alpha_process$total$raw_alpha, nrow(process_items)))
alpha_process$total |> kable(digits = 3) |> kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```

```{r composite-process}
df <- df |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(process_agency = mean(c(process_producing, process_responsible, process_involved), na.rm = FALSE)) |>
  ungroup()
```

## 6.2 Outcome Agency

Items: `outcome_capable`, `outcome_effective`, `outcome_power`

```{r alpha-outcome}
outcome_items <- df |> select(outcome_capable, outcome_effective, outcome_power) |> drop_na()
alpha_outcome <- psych::alpha(outcome_items, check.keys = FALSE)
cat(sprintf("Cronbach's Œ± = %.2f (N = %d)\n", alpha_outcome$total$raw_alpha, nrow(outcome_items)))
alpha_outcome$total |> kable(digits = 3) |> kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```

```{r composite-outcome}
df <- df |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(outcome_agency = mean(c(outcome_capable, outcome_effective, outcome_power), na.rm = FALSE)) |>
  ungroup()
```

## 6.3 Meaning

Items: `meaning_fulfilling`, `meaning_meaningful`, `meaning_mattered`

```{r alpha-meaning}
meaning_items <- df |> select(meaning_fulfilling, meaning_meaningful, meaning_mattered) |> drop_na()
alpha_meaning <- psych::alpha(meaning_items, check.keys = FALSE)
cat(sprintf("Cronbach's Œ± = %.2f (N = %d)\n", alpha_meaning$total$raw_alpha, nrow(meaning_items)))
alpha_meaning$total |> kable(digits = 3) |> kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```

```{r composite-meaning}
df <- df |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(meaning = mean(c(meaning_fulfilling, meaning_meaningful, meaning_mattered), na.rm = FALSE)) |>
  ungroup()
```

## 6.4 Identity

Items: `identity_funny`, `identity_importance`, `identity_reflects`

```{r alpha-identity}
identity_items <- df |> select(identity_funny, identity_importance, identity_reflects) |> drop_na()
alpha_identity <- psych::alpha(identity_items, check.keys = FALSE)
cat(sprintf("Cronbach's Œ± = %.2f (N = %d)\n", alpha_identity$total$raw_alpha, nrow(identity_items)))
alpha_identity$total |> kable(digits = 3) |> kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```

```{r composite-identity}
df <- df |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(identity = mean(c(identity_funny, identity_importance, identity_reflects), na.rm = FALSE)) |>
  ungroup()
```

## 6.5 Reliability Summary

```{r alpha-summary}
tibble(
  Composite = c("Process Agency", "Outcome Agency", "Meaning", "Identity"),
  Items = c("producing, responsible, involved",
            "capable, effective, power",
            "fulfilling, meaningful, mattered",
            "funny, importance, reflects"),
  N = c(nrow(process_items), nrow(outcome_items), nrow(meaning_items), nrow(identity_items)),
  Alpha = c(alpha_process$total$raw_alpha,
            alpha_outcome$total$raw_alpha,
            alpha_meaning$total$raw_alpha,
            alpha_identity$total$raw_alpha)
) |>
  mutate(Alpha = sprintf("%.2f", Alpha)) |>
  kable() |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
```

# 7. Final Dataset Summary

```{r summary}
cat(sprintf("Final dataset: %d participants √ó %d variables\n", nrow(df), ncol(df)))
cat(sprintf("\nCondition breakdown:\n"))
df |> count(condition, study) |> kable() |> kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```

```{r descriptives}
df |>
  select(where(is.numeric), -matches("^llm_|attention_check|real_percentile")) |>
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  group_by(variable) |>
  summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(value)),
    mean = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), \(x) round(x, 2))) |>
  kable() |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
```

# 8. Export

```{r export}
write_csv(df, "data_clean.csv")
cat(sprintf("Wrote data_clean.csv: %d rows √ó %d columns\n", nrow(df), ncol(df)))
```
